title: Mushroom Golems
body:
# Mushroom Golems **Hi!** This pack is based on concept art that I created and adds Mushroom Golem statues to your game! **Make sure you have installed Optifine, then rename Carved Pumpkin block in the anvil to:** | Red | Brown | Crimson | Warped | |:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:| |Red Mushroom Golem|Brown Mushroom Golem|Crimson Fungus Golem|Warped Fungus Golem| |Red Mushroom Golem 2|Brown Mushroom Golem 2|Crimson Fungus Golem 2|Warped Fungus Golem 2| |Red Mushroom Golem 3|Brown Mushroom Golem 3|Crimson Fungus Golem 3|Warped Fungus Golem 3| |Red Mushroom Golem 4|Brown Mushroom Golem 4|Crimson Fungus Golem 4|Warped Fungus Golem 4| You can place those little guys on your head or put them in the item frame to decorate your world! **Check out version differences to download pack you like more!**
**Hope you like it!**
